items.description: Visible viewport blocking elements or overlays.
notes: Used to gate safe intervention eligibility.

items.description: How easy the primary call to action is to identify.
notes: Separate from CTA effectiveness or conversion impact.

items.description: How easy primary navigation is to detect and use.
notes: Avoids conflating hidden routes with visible hierarchy.

items.description: How visually dense the viewport feels.
notes: Observation only; not automatically good or bad.

items.description: Consistency of visual language across the viewport.
notes: Does not imply sameness or sameness as quality.

items.description: How much expressive visual variation is present.
notes: Useful for creative intent versus noise analysis.

items.description: Whether irregularity reads as intentional rather than error.
notes: Used to avoid treating rule-breaking as defect by default.
